programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Seasonal sequel with Erin Krakow. Miranda is looking forward to spending the holidays making new memories with her long-lost family in Vermont, but an anonymous text could change everything. (2017)
Heavy Date: A young man with no particular direction in life has a breakdown after finding out that the girl he is in love with is pregnant.
